comment: Curated catalog of MCP servers the Cost+Billing suite knows how to leverage. install.sh --mcp <name> reads this catalog. For custom MCPs not listed, use --mcp-config <path-to-your-config.json>.

outline.name: Outline
outline.description: Read product docs from a self-hosted or cloud Outline workspace.

notion.name: Notion
notion.description: Read product docs / pricing pages / internal specs from Notion.

google-drive.name: Google Drive
google-drive.description: Read product docs from Drive AND/OR use a Drive folder as the chain handoff channel.

env_vars.name: GDRIVE_CREDENTIALS_PATH
env_vars.prompt: Path to Google service account JSON (do NOT paste the key value here)

github.name: GitHub
github.description: Read pricing source-of-truth from a private repo, OR read the customer's own repo metadata (for the engineer-stage repo-info questions).

env_vars.name: GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN
env_vars.prompt: GitHub fine-grained PAT (scoped to read:repo for the customer's repo)

filesystem.name: Filesystem (local handoff folder)
filesystem.description: Local file access for chain handoff folder — use this when no cloud-sync MCP is available and the customer wants the chain handoff to live in a local path (e.g., NFS mount, SharePoint sync target).

env_vars.name: FILESYSTEM_ALLOWED_PATH
env_vars.prompt: Absolute path the MCP is allowed to read/write (e.g., ~/MoolabsChain)

1password.name: 1Password
1password.description: Read Moolabs SDK API key + cloud creds from 1Password without exposing values. Codemod's emitted code uses `op://` references instead of inlining secret reads.

env_vars.name: OP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN
env_vars.prompt: 1Password service account token (1Password → Developer → Service Accounts)

vault.name: HashiCorp Vault
vault.description: Read SDK keys / AWS creds from Vault. Codemod's emitted code uses Vault read calls.

env_vars.name: VAULT_TOKEN
env_vars.prompt: Vault token (or use AppRole — see Vault docs)

playwright.name: Playwright (web fetch)
playwright.description: Headless browser for fetching the customer's public pricing page (JS-rendered). Use when pricing-page URL is JavaScript-heavy and simple fetch fails.

linear.name: Linear
linear.description: Read open compliance / pricing tickets to surface as constraints during the finance/CPO stages.

env_vars.name: LINEAR_API_KEY
env_vars.prompt: Linear API key (Linear → Settings → API → Personal API keys)

platform_mcp_paths.comment: Where each agent platform stores its MCP config. install.sh writes to the file matching the install --platform.

claude-code.restart_command: Restart Claude Code (Cmd+Q / quit, then relaunch)

chatgpt-desktop.user_path_note: ChatGPT Desktop configures MCPs via UI Settings → MCP servers (no file). install.sh prints the snippet for manual paste.
